name: Base Characters
description: The Base Game characters will be on the select screen

name: Base Characters (GF)
description: The Base Game characters for GF will be on the select screen

name: Mod Characters
description: The Mod characters (from mods/characters) will be on the select screen

name: Load Characters with C
description: Makes it when your in the character select you have to press c to see the character your choosing. This can save a LOT of memory. (btw it loads the character in when you exit out of the character select)

name: Preload Characters
description: Preloads ALL the the characters in the character select but might use a lot of memory

name: Preload Characters (GF)
description: Preloads ALL the the characters for GF in the character select but might use a lot of memory

name: Any GF
description: Makes it so it doesn't just take the jsons that have "gf-" at the start of the file name

name: Saved Character First
description: Makes it so it makes the Saved character first and not the orignal character
